hero.description: Code, robots, and a bit of chaos. Full-stack developer focused on automation and robotics, turning hard problems into things that ship, and sometimes, things that move.

about.label: 01, About
about.subtitle: Who I am •

headline.p3: , building things since the Lego years.

about.bio_1: Since a kid, always into technology and building things. I started writing code at 13, turned it into a real job at 15, and never stopped. From RPA scripts to microservices on GCP, the problems keep getting bigger.
about.bio_2: Today I'm a full-stack developer, a Robotics Engineering student at UFV, and part of NERo, where I build software for educational robots. I like hard problems, clean code, and things that actually move.

inicio.title: The Beginning
inicio.description: First computer and a robotics kit. A "Hello, World!" on screen and a blinking LED showed that machines could obey ideas.

primeiros.title: First Projects
primeiros.description: Deep dive into learning: robotics, logic, and web fundamentals. Each project was a new problem to solve.
highlights: Robotics projects with Arduino and sensors
First Python scripts and HTML pages from scratch
First steps in web development and automation

oportunidade.title: First Opportunity
oportunidade.description: A school presentation, a website put together, and someone from outside noticed. First paid project as a teenager, followed by 10+ deliveries in automation and API integrations.
highlights: Automations that saved hours of manual work per week
Web scraping integrated with client CRMs
First professional income at 15 years old

estagio.title: Internship at Etho Soluções IT
estagio.description: Started as an intern and left different. Automated internal processes, led a national-scale data analysis project, and took my first steps on the company's internal portal.
highlights: Data analysis for a major national strategic client
First steps with Go and FastAPI in a professional environment
Financial reports and correction of internal discrepancies
Automation of processes that were previously done manually

developer.title: Developer at Etho Soluções
developer.description: Exactly 1 year after joining as an intern, became a developer. Took over the internal portal as the main project, a full-stack platform used by every department, and started supporting admin and finance with real technical solutions.
highlights: Platform used daily by every department in the company
Microservices with DDD, Docker, and CI/CD
Deploy on GCP with Cloud Run and private VPC
APIs integrated with AI agents: from ~10 min to ~1 min per task

msd.title: Data Analyst at MSD Animal Health
msd.description: First in-person experience, in another state, inside a multinational. 6 months on a global migration project, with daily contact with people from 7+ countries.
highlights: Large-scale data migration with cross-system validation
Python and C# tooling for data cleaning and standardization, eliminating cross-system inconsistencies

nero.title: NERo UFV, Robotics Engineering
nero.description: Admitted to UFV before finishing high school. Joined the robotics lab in the very first month and took over all software responsibilities for an educational robotics project.
highlights: Responsible for the robot's code and the app that connects to it
Embedded software in C++ for robot control and communication

plataforma.title: Enterprise Platform
plataforma.description: Full-stack platform used across every department, Finance, HR, and Admin. Microservices on GCP, role-based dashboards, internal AI integrations.

agent.title: Personal Agent
agent.description: AI agent connected with multiple tools using FastAPI, built on top of Ollama.

notfound.title: Page not found
notfound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or was moved.
